column1: Ildemaro Vargas leads the slate with a strong hit probability and a high rate of games with a hit, benefiting from a favorable park and the platoon edge against Tomoyuki Sugano. Bobby Witt Jr. offers steady reliability near the top of the order and has been even hotter recently, making him a solid secondary option. Luis Arraez and Ivan Herrera also bring platoon advantages but don’t match Vargas’s consistency or upside in this spot.
